understanding.goal_understanding: Move all selectable pieces onto every goal tile marked '+' at the same time to win the level; all goals must be covered simultaneously.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Clicking a tile selects a nearby piece or issues a move command to the currently selected piece along a clear path; pieces slide until blocked by walls/obstacles or edges. No pushing observed. Clicks on unreachable/blocked locations or invalid selections cause no movement. Repeated back-and-forth moves between open positions like [9,21] and [21,21] were possible along a straight corridor.
